# Md Minaruzzaman Shovon — Portfolio & Security Research

> Md Minaruzzaman Shovon is a Full-Stack Developer, WordPress Security Researcher, and Water Resources Engineering student based in Bangladesh.

## Core Profiles & Portfolios
- [Developer Portfolio](https://shovon.bd/dev): Full-stack web engineering with Next.js, TypeScript, UI engineering, and AI product integration.
- [Water Resources Engineering Portfolio](https://shovon.bd/academic): Academic research in hydrology, GIS spatial modeling, and environmental computing at CUET.
- [Security Advisories](https://shovon.bd/security): Responsible vulnerability disclosures and CVE advisories for WordPress plugins.
- [Apps & Software](https://shovon.bd/apps): Web & mobile applications (Attendly Tutor, Mono Alarm, NU Assistant BD, Chalk).

## Disclosed Security Research (CVEs)
- [CVE-2026-14322](https://shovon.bd/security/cve-2026-14322): Timetics < 1.0.57 Unauthenticated Booking Auto-Approval via Arbitrary payment_method (CVSS 5.3 Medium). Discovered and reported by Md Minaruzzaman Shovon. Patched in 1.0.57.
- [CVE-2026-10749](https://shovon.bd/security/cve-2026-10749): Post Duplicator <= 3.0.14 PHP Object Injection via unsanitized unserialize() (CVSS 7.2 High). Discovered and reported by Md Minaruzzaman Shovon. Patched in 3.0.15.
- [CVE-2026-57661](https://shovon.bd/security/cve-2026-57661): WPComplete <= 2.9.5.5 Broken Access Control allowing Subscriber-level privilege abuse (CVSS 5.4 Medium). Discovered and reported by Md Minaruzzaman Shovon. Patched in 2.9.5.6.
